---
title: "About me"
image: profile.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/anarinsk
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/anarinsk

---

About this blog
